gaps.title: Bull Market Support Band
gaps.question: What is the significance of the Bull Market Support Band in the current market cycle?
gaps.answer: The combination of the 20-week SMA and 21-week EMA that historically acts as support in bull markets.

gaps.title: Logarithmic Regression
gaps.question: What is the significance of the Logarithmic Regression in the current market cycle?
gaps.answer: A mathematical model used to determine the fair value of Bitcoin over time based on diminishing returns.

gaps.title: Bitcoin Risk Levels
gaps.question: What is the significance of the Bitcoin Risk Levels in the current market cycle?
gaps.answer: A metric from 0 to 1 based on logarithmic regression that indicates market heat (0-0.3 is accumulation, 0.7-1.0 is peak).

gaps.title: ETH/BTC Ratio
gaps.question: What is the significance of the ETH/BTC Ratio in the current market cycle?
gaps.answer: The valuation of Ethereum in terms of Bitcoin, often used to signal alt-season or flight to safety.

gaps.title: Macro Backdrop
gaps.question: What is the significance of the Macro Backdrop in the current market cycle?
gaps.answer: The overall economic environment, including FED interest rates and SP500 performance, impacting all risk assets.
